## Summary

- explain the user-facing or maintainer-facing change

## Verification

- [ ] I ran the relevant local checks
- [ ] I described what I actually verified

## Release hygiene

- [ ] I updated `CHANGELOG.md` if the change is user-visible
- [ ] I updated `VERSION` and `plasmoid/org.kde.plasma.wifimimo/metadata.json` if this changes the release version
- [ ] I updated docs if behavior or installation changed
